task_description: Implement a global Edit Mode / Preview Mode feature. Preview Mode makes the project read-only: users can navigate, zoom, pan, read content, and view data, but cannot create, edit, move, resize, delete, or modify anything. No database writes should occur in Preview Mode. A toggle button in the header shows and switches between modes.

verification.summary: Build succeeds with no errors. No test framework exists in the project so verification is limited to successful Vite production build. The implementation covers 63 points of isPreviewMode guards across App.jsx plus all 4 child components (CardEditorPanel, FullTaskManager, PinPanel, ReminderPanel).
